No Poverty.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus supports a contribution to eradicating poverty.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus supports a contribution to ending hunger or improving food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course includes basic Korean phrases related to health ('어디가 아파요?'), but these are purely linguistic and do not contribute substantively to any specific SDG 3 targets.

Quality Education.reason: The course is tertiary education (4.3), develops skills for employment (4.4), and fosters appreciation of cultural diversity through Korean history and culture (4.7). This directly aligns with multiple targets.
